message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor Requester
participant "PageLocsMgr" as PLM
circle MgrQueue
participant "StateTask" as ST
circle StateQueue
circle RetrieveQueue
participant "RetrieverTask" as RT

== Initialization ==
PLM -> RT : Startup
PLM -> ST : Startup
PLM -> StateQueue : start(doc, first_item, item_count)

note right of MgrQueue: The document retrieval\noptimizes the order of\nthe items considering\nhow the user interacts.

StateQueue -> ST : start_document(...)

== Document Retrieval Loop ==
group loop [All Items]
    ST -> RetrieveQueue : retrieve(item)
    RetrieveQueue -> RT : retrieve(item)
    activate RT
    RT -> RT : do item
    deactivate RT
    RT -> StateQueue : item_retrieved(item)
    StateQueue -> ST : item_retrieved(item)
end

== Item already known ==
Requester -> PLM : get_page_loc(item, offset)
activate PLM
PLM --> Requester : got_it(start_offset, size)
deactivate PLM

== Item needs to be retrieved (no yet in the list) ==
Requester -> PLM : get_page_loc(item, offset)
activate PLM
PLM -> StateQueue : retrieve_asap(item)
StateQueue -> ST : retrieve_asap(item)
ST -> RetrieveQueue : retrieve(item)
RetrieveQueue -> RT : retrieve(item)
activate RT
RT -> RT : do item
deactivate RT
RT -> StateQueue : item_retrieved(item)
StateQueue -> ST : item_retrieved(item)
ST -> MgrQueue : got_asap(item)
MgrQueue -> PLM : got_asap(item)
PLM --> Requester : got_it(start_offset, size)
deactivate PLM

ST -> MgrQueue : end_document()
MgrQueue -> PLM : end_document()

@enduml
```
